issues.resolution: Per-route authz matrix; handler helper authz.RequireHTTP before service call.

Strict ETag strong-only parser; 428 on missing If-Match; 412 on mismatch; wildcard * accepted.
errors.As/Is unwrap chain; decode error branches (SyntaxError, UnmarshalTypeError, EOF, MaxBytesError, strictjson.ErrDuplicateKey) mapped to 400/413.
strictjson.Decode helper: MaxBytesReader 64KB, Content-Type check, DisallowUnknownFields, duplicate-key rejection.
HMAC-signed cursor with exp; default 25 max 100; created_at DESC, id ASC tie-breaker; tampered/expired → 400.
Per-handler 9-case table test + middleware ordering + request_id propagation tests.
OpenAPI headers + shared components + CI contract-sync test.

action_taken: All 8 fixes applied inline. Migration 0146 added (Task 7.0). Round 2 skipped.
